# services.unison

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.unison`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.unison.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Unison synchronisation. |
| `services.unison.package` | `package` | The unison package to use. |
| `services.unison.pairs` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Unison root pairs to keep synchronised. |
| `services.unison.pairs.<name>.commandOptions` | `attribute set of (string or list of string)` | Additional command line options as a dictionary to pass to the `unison` program. Use a list of strings to declare the same option multiple times. See {manpage}`unison(1)` for a list of available options. |
| `services.unison.pairs.<name>.roots` | `list of string of length 2` | Pair of roots to synchronise. |
| `services.unison.pairs.<name>.stateDirectory` | `absolute path` | Unison state directory to use. |
